query: CVX Chevron next earnings date Q1 2026 EPS estimate

results.title: Chevron (CVX) 2026 Earnings Preview: Timing Charges Cloud a Strong Production Quarter
Chevron Corporation Common Stock (CVX) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts | Nasdaq
CVX Chevron Earnings Preview: May 1, 2026 | Meyka

summary: Q1 2026 earnings: May 1, 2026 (BMO). EPS consensus: $0.92-$0.97 (Zacks $0.92, Meyka/Nasdaq $0.97). Note: large non-cash downstream timing charges ($2.7B-$3.7B after-tax) are expected to depress reported EPS sharply vs. prior-year $2.68. Production grew YoY; charges expected to reverse in future quarters.
